beats.n_start: {HERO} sees {GOAL} in {THRESHOLD}; it flutters past {ROUTE_A_ZONE}, past {ROUTE_B_ZONE}, and toward {ROUTE_C_ZONE}; {HERO} wants to follow it
beats.n_daisies: {GOAL} dances over {ROUTE_A_ZONE} where a soft, fuzzy {A1_LURE} hums a happy tune; then it floats on toward {A2_LANDMARK}; {HERO} can watch the {A1_LURE} or keep following
beats.n_bee_end: {HERO} watches the happy {A1_LURE} bumble from flower to flower; when {HERO} looks up, {GOAL} is gone; {HERO} trots back to {ENTRANCE}, warm and glad anyway
beats.n_birdbath: at {A2_LANDMARK} a little {A2_DETAIL1} splashes and shakes bright drops in the sun; {GOAL} rests on the rim, then drifts on toward the {A2_LANDMARK2}
beats.n_strawberries: the {A2_LANDMARK2} hide under cool green leaves; {GOAL} loops around them and flutters deeper into {THRESHOLD} toward {A2_ZONE}
beats.n_meadow: in {A2_ZONE} {GOAL} slows down and floats gently, right in front of {HERO}'s little nose; nearby sits {A2_OFFER1}; {HERO} holds very still
beats.n_nose_end: the gentle {GOAL} lands softly right on the tip of {HERO}'s {A2_PRIZE1}; its wings open and close like two tiny blue fans; {HERO} giggles, still as can be, the happiest kitten in {THRESHOLD}
beats.n_crown_end: beside {A2_ZONE} {HERO} finds {A2_OFFER1}, a tiny flower crown just her size; {GOAL} circles it once, and {HERO} wears the crown proudly, a sweet garden treasure
beats.n_pond: by {ROUTE_B_ZONE} a green {B1_LURE} sits on a lily pad and blinks; {GOAL} skims over the water toward {B2_LANDMARK1}; {HERO} can play with the {B1_LURE} or follow on
beats.n_frog_end: {HERO} and the {B1_LURE} play a giggly game of peekaboo around the lily pad, splish, splash, hop; by the time the game ends {GOAL} has floated away, and {HERO} pads home for a cozy nap, content
beats.n_reeds: {GOAL} weaves between {B2_LANDMARK1}; a shiny {B2_DETAIL1} zips by like a tiny helicopter; {GOAL} leads {HERO} onward toward a soft, {B2_LANDMARK2}
beats.n_hedgehog: under the {B2_LANDMARK2} a small {B2_DETAIL2} snoozes in a ball of soft prickles; {HERO} steps quietly so it can sleep, and follows {GOAL} into {B2_ZONE}
beats.n_friend: in {B2_ZONE} {HERO} meets {B2_OFFER1}, {B2_DETAIL3}; {GOAL} rests on a leaf above them, and {B2_OFFER1} smiles a shy hello
beats.n_share_end: {HERO} and {B2_OFFER1} share {B2_DETAIL4} that grow nearby while {GOAL} watches from a leaf; two happy new friends, sticky little paws, and a lovely, sunny garden afternoon together
beats.n_grass: in {ROUTE_C_ZONE} {GOAL} bounces up and down like a little kite; {HERO} can dash after it fast, or tiptoe slow and quiet through the soft green blades
beats.n_lost_end: {HERO} pounces and dashes, paws thumping, so fast that the surprised {GOAL} zips high over {C1_LANDMARK}; {HERO} cannot follow up there, so she trots back to {ENTRANCE}, tail high and happy
beats.n_sunflower: stepping softly, {HERO} follows {GOAL} under {C2_LANDMARK1}; {GOAL} floats on toward {C2_LANDMARK2}
beats.n_gate: {GOAL} slips through {C2_LANDMARK2} into {C2_ZONE}, full of purple and pink blooms; {HERO} squeezes gently after it, whiskers twitching
beats.n_arch: in {C2_ZONE} a green leafy {C2_LANDMARK3} curves overhead, dripping with sweet honeysuckle; {GOAL} circles the {C2_LANDMARK3} and slows, as if it is waiting just for {HERO}
beats.n_perch_end: {HERO} sits very still beneath the flowery {C2_LANDMARK3}, and {GOAL} settles on {HERO}'s soft ear like a little bow; they rest together in the sweet-smelling shade, calm and cozy and glad
